title: hieracium frigidellum
intro: Hieracium frigidellum, also known as the Alpine Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. Hieracium frigidellum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
